component_scope: automotive laminated windshield assembly with integrated HUD projection zone
proposed_specifications: Two-ply laminated windshield construction using 2.1 mm clear soda-lime float glass outer ply and 1.6 mm clear soda-lime float glass inner ply bonded with a 0.76 mm polyvinyl butyral (PVB) interlayer. Total stack thickness Tt = 4.46 mm. HUD projection zone occupies the upper-central 300 mm x 120 mm area of the inner glass surface, applying a 0.05 mrad wedge angle via gradient-thickness PVB to eliminate ghost images. The outer surface carries a magnetron-sputtered low-emissivity silver-based coating (Ag layer 12 nm) for IR rejection, strictly outside the HUD visibility region. Peripheral ceramic frit band 20 mm wide around all edges. Designed for passenger car OEM fitment, meeting ECE R43 and ANSI Z26.1 optical distortion Class A.
